title: Conditional coloring on Automation
excerpt:
I want conditional coloring on some conditions so, is there any automation present so I can change conditional color. 
USE CASE: Coloring the column if past dates are selected when the status is pending.

posts.author: Vaibhav.S.G (Vaibhav Ghaste)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: jodisegal (Jodi Segal)
posts.cookedHtml: Me, too. For grantseeking, I want the Grant Code field to light up when the status changes to Awarded.
